---
title: "Elsewhere"
---

Randy on tumble track

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/embed/CmiMagOX9JE >}}

405 deadlift at 155 bw

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/embed/ib_LIoSQW6E >}}

V7 boulder

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/embed/7AG41ips5Pk >}}

Feeding goat

![](images/feeding_goat.jpg){width=600}
